problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site — specifically Small molecule inhibitor — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
